untranslatable_reason: Pipe Bottom pattern requires multi-bar week-level analysis distinguishing between 'inside weeks' (high < prev_high AND low > prev_low) vs 'outside weeks' (high > prev_high AND low < prev_low) with specific no-tie conditions. Available indicators operate on daily bars without week-level aggregation or tie-detection logic. The pattern logic of 'two adjacent downward spikes' followed by third-week rise requires explicit week-boundary detection and comparison across 3 distinct weekly candles, which cannot be reliably expressed with daily bar indicators alone.
